segments.title: Q turret flash and armor lesson
segments.summary: A short Q turret explosion clip turns turret damage into a quick lesson about armor, gunnery damage, and naval budget tradeoffs.
segments.body: This brief video moment frames a ship design as a budget contest involving the German navy and the German Army, then immediately shows why turret protection matters. After the turret event, the reaction is blunt: the result is spectacular, but the design lesson is to put more armor on the turrets. It is a compact watch point for the link between naval gunnery damage, survivability, and ship-design compromises.

evidence.note: The opening frames the scenario as a budget fight involving the German navy and the German Army.
The transcript reacts to the turret event and concludes with a note to add more armor to the turrets.
